name: godot-smashthemesh
desc: Smash The Mesh (STM) is a Godot add-on that allows you to break 3D meshes into multiple pieces and apply physics to each fragment. It includes features for sav…
descFull: Smash The Mesh (STM) is a Godot add-on that allows you to break 3D meshes into multiple pieces and apply physics to each fragment. It includes features for saving the results to disk (cache) for quick loading.
